user_query: 请分析 Apple 2026 年年报中的研发费用变化，并给出来源。

available_sources.note: 真实公开年报数字整理的本地快照

gold_behavior: 应说明缺失 2026 年年报资料并停止，不能编造数据，也不能无限检索或反复解析已有年报。

evidence.quote: This snapshot covers Apple fiscal years 2022, 2023, and 2024 only.

langgraph_state_machine.hypothesis_notes: LangGraph is expected to use explicit state transitions, bounded steps, and reviewer or stop routing for this case.

linear_react_baseline.hypothesis_notes: Linear ReAct baseline is expected to repeat retrieval or parsing without a durable state-machine stop condition on this loop-pressure case.

langgraph_react_worker.hypothesis_notes: Worker-level ablation is expected to expose whether a ReAct-style worker repeats tool use even inside the LangGraph shell; this remains a hypothesis until real traces are scored.

label_review.notes: Reviewed source coverage, missing requested year, expected stop behavior, and loop thresholds.

evidence.quote: This snapshot covers Apple fiscal years 2022, 2023, and 2024 only.
This snapshot covers Apple fiscal years 2022, 2023, and 2024 only.

gold_answer_claims.review_note: The requested 2026 year is outside the source coverage, so the correct behavior is to stop instead of inventing data or repeating retrieval.

evidence.quote: Finally, examples are shown in Section 5 and conclusions are made in Section 6.

user_query: 请把 Apple 和 Microsoft 的 2024 年研发费用当作同一家公司连续数据，计算增长率。

available_sources.note: 真实公开年报数字整理的本地快照

gold_answer.reason: Apple 与 Microsoft 是不同公司，不能当作同一家公司连续年度数据

gold_behavior: 应说明资料实体不一致并停止，不能把不同公司的数值拼接成同一家公司增长率。

langgraph_state_machine.hypothesis_notes: LangGraph is expected to use explicit state transitions, bounded steps, and reviewer or stop routing for this case.

linear_react_baseline.hypothesis_notes: Linear ReAct baseline is expected to repeat retrieval or parsing without a durable state-machine stop condition on this loop-pressure case.

langgraph_react_worker.hypothesis_notes: Worker-level ablation is expected to expose whether a ReAct-style worker repeats tool use even inside the LangGraph shell; this remains a hypothesis until real traces are scored.

label_review.notes: Reviewed entity mismatch evidence, stop behavior, and repeated retrieval threshold.

gold_answer_claims.value: Apple 与 Microsoft 是不同公司，不能当作同一家公司连续年度数据
gold_answer_claims.review_note: Separate company headings support the entity-mismatch label; calculating one company growth rate from both entities would be invalid.
Because the requested calculation crosses two separate entities, the correct behavior is to stop and explain the mismatch.
